---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

A clear, short description of the change.

## Why

What's the underlying need? What does this enable that's hard or
impossible today?

## Charter and design implications

Does this change touch the Charter (`docs/01-charter.md`) or any
of the institutional mechanics in the `docs/` chapters? If so,
which? A feature that contradicts the Charter is unlikely to
land without an explicit amendment first.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve the same need? Why is this approach better?
